message:
fix(tests): remove broken async skipIf on Agent Mail integration tests

The skipIf(async () => ...) pattern doesn't work — Vitest evaluates
the Promise object (truthy) synchronously, so tests were always skipped
even when Agent Mail is running. The beforeEach guard already handles
the conditional skip correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
